title: Technical Maturity

assumptions.text: Production capacity target (tonnes LFP CAM per year) not specified. FREYR comparator is 30,000 t/yr. User must confirm actual target.
Spray dryer throughput capacity and number of units not specified. To be confirmed based on production target.
No independent technical due diligence reports available at this stage. Feasibility study serves as primary technical documentation.
Furnace type (roller hearth kiln vs electric rotary kiln) not finalised. Both options are presented.

open_issues.text: LFP-specific calcination energy data (kWh/t) not published. Estimate of 3-6 kWh/kg based on NMC analog requires validation by process engineering team.
Block flow diagrams and process flow diagrams to be included in Feasibility Study annex. Draft references these but they are not yet prepared.
TRL assessment table in Section 1 must be consistent with the TRL summary in 3.1a. Cross-reference needed.

evaluation_criterion: 3.1 — Technical maturity (max 5, min pass 3, weight x2 = max 10 weighted points)

scoring_targets.process_flow_diagrams: Described, referenced to Feasibility Study annex
scoring_targets.mass_energy_balances: Included with published analog data; LFP-specific data gap flagged
